headline: UAE Habshan-Fujairah pipeline bypass provides critical alternative route
body: The UAE's 1.8 million b/d Habshan to Fujairah pipeline bypass is operating near capacity, providing a critical alternative route for crude oil exports that avoids the Strait of Hormuz. The pipeline connects oil fields in Abu Dhabi to the port of Fujairah on the Gulf of Oman. This bypass capacity represents the only confirmed pipeline alternative for Gulf producers.
